svg.title: Shipment tracking pipeline architecture
svg.desc: End-to-end real-time data pipeline: Python producer generates synthetic events, Kafka streams them in KRaft mode, a Python consumer writes to PostgreSQL, dbt transforms data into staging and mart models, Airflow orchestrates hourly dbt runs, GitHub Actions runs CI tests on push, and AWS S3 archives raw events provisioned via Terraform.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the Python producer work?')
sendPrompt('How does Kafka KRaft mode work?')
sendPrompt('How does the Python consumer work?')
sendPrompt('How is PostgreSQL used in this pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What does the dbt staging model do?')
sendPrompt('What do the dbt mart models answer?')
sendPrompt('How does Airflow orchestrate the pipeline?')
sendPrompt('How does the GitHub Actions CI/CD workflow work?')
sendPrompt('How is AWS S3 provisioned with Terraform?')
